verdict: EXTEND — all 5 candidate Kaya-referencing cards confirmed in corpus with flavor-text or trivia attribution Kaya. The Kaya character node's own body (wave 90E1) already cited each of the 5 prints with full canonical receipts including verbatim flavor text. The appears_on list was the only thing under-wired; this pass extends it from 1 anchor to 6 and wires `characters: [kaya]` to all 5 newly-added cards.

endpoints.name: Orzhov Guildgate (252)
endpoints.evidence: flavor_text speaker: Kaya (RNA-252 verbatim: 'So much wealth. So much splendor. So much temptation to believe the gilded lie.')

endpoints.name: Spark Reaper
endpoints.evidence: flavor_text speaker: Kaya (WAR-106 verbatim: 'I know they're unstoppable fighters created to harvest souls—it's just they're so rude about it.')

endpoints.name: Talisman of Hierarchy
endpoints.evidence: flavor_text speaker: Kaya (CLB-878 verbatim: 'You'll never get to the top if you don't know who's already there.')

endpoints.name: Fanatical Strength
endpoints.evidence: flavor_text named speaker: Kaya (MKM-159 verbatim: '"What is this? An ambush or a staring contest?" Kaya taunted. As if in answer, the robed figure lunged forward.')

endpoints.name: Deadly Complication (Showcase)
endpoints.evidence: flavor_text named character: Kaya (MKM-312 verbatim: 'Teysa's security was unrivaled. Etrata was locked up. Kaya was left with nothing but multiplying questions... and a dead friend.')

description: Five-out-of-five wire confirmations, no refusals. The Kaya node's body already had the receipts laid out — RNA-252 Orzhov Guildgate (Kaya as Orzhov-guildmaster speaker), WAR-106 Spark Reaper (Kaya as WAR-resistance speaker), CLB-878 Talisman of Hierarchy (Kaya as Orzhov-political-instinct speaker), MKM-159 Fanatical Strength (Kaya as MKM-detective scene anchor with quoted dialogue), MKM-312 Deadly Complication showcase (Kaya as MKM-narrative-aftermath named character). Sustained four-set flavor-voice arc spanning 2019-2024. The five-year flavor-voice continuity is by itself a Wizards-canon-authored mini-arc that the BBL graph now traverses. CN2-precedent for kaya-as-flavor-voice anchor is the canonical Wizards mechanism; not stretching anything.
citations: [Scryfall WAR-106 flavor_text: 'I know they're unstoppable fighters...' —Kaya]

files_modified: cards/_characters/kaya.md (appears_on extended 1->6; Appears on body wikilink list extended 1->6)
other_candidates_considered: The 4 related-card-citation prints (MKM-125 Felonious Rage, WAR-81 Charity Extractor, M21-35 Secure the Scene, MH3-132 Ral and the Implicit Maze) are deliberately NOT added to appears_on — these are flavor-frame citations in trivia bullets, not flavor-text speaker or named-in-flavor anchors. They remain in the Kaya node body's 'Aspects in the corpus' section as graph-context, not as substantive anchors. This preserves the appears_on threshold-of-anchor-quality discipline. MKM-116 The Chase Is On retains its position as the sole verified-depiction print (the other 5 are flavor-only).
